notes.connections:
Keithley 0  (Power Supply)
    CH1 "3.3a" → 3.3 V, 1.0 A limit
    CH2 "3.3b" → 3.3 V, 1.0 A limit
    CH3 "P5V" → 5.0 V, 1.0 A limit
Hittite 0 LO  (Signal Generator) → LO
Hittite 1 RF  (Signal Generator) → RF
FieldFox 0 IF  (Spectrum Analyzer) ← IF
Keithley 1  (Power Supply)
    CH1 "Beam" → 0.0 V, 1.0 A limit
    CH2 "CH2" → 0.0 V, 1.0 A limit
    CH3 "CH3" → 0.0 V, 1.0 A limit
Keysight EL 0  (Electronic Load)
    CH1 – CC mode, 0.1, input OFF
    CH2 – CR mode, 10000, input ON
notes.sources:
Keithley 0 – DUT power: 3.3V @ 3.3 V, 1.8V @ 1.8 V
Hittite 0 LO – 30 GHz, 5 dBm
Hittite 1 RF – 35 GHz, -10 dBm
FieldFox 0 IF – Spectrum analyzer, center 5 GHz, span 6 GHz
Keithley 1 – DUT power supply (channels unused or 0 V)
Keysight EL 0 – Electronic load
notes.monitoring:
Keithley 0 – Monitor supply currents on all active channels
FieldFox 0 IF – Record output spectrum
Keithley 1 – Monitor supply currents on all active channels
Keysight EL 0 – Monitor load currents / voltages
notes.general:
Config: ADMV1320
Band 3, IF low band, USB
Power-up sequence (order matters):
    KeithleyChannel: Keithley 0 Channel 1
    Delay: 1.0 s
    KeithleyChannel: Keithley 0 Channel 2
    Delay: 1.0 s
    Instrument: Hittite 0 LO
    Instrument: Hittite 1 RF

Have to press "configure part" twice
